column1: -- Optional sanity-check script. Run AFTER schema.sql + import_data.sql to
-- confirm the dataset loaded with full referential integrity and that the
-- minimum row counts for Track A are met.
\echo '== Track A minimum check (news_articles must be >= 1000) =='
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = sp.company_id
LEFT JOIN news_articles n ON n.article_id = ac.article_id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = ac.company_id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.company_id = ar.company_id
\echo '== Domain constraint checks (every count must be 0) =='
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) FROM companies)                AS distinct_tickers
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies WHERE market_cap_usd IS NULL) AS null_market_caps
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT indicator_name) FROM economic_indicators) AS fred_series;
